array.string: # Bail early if working dir doesn't exist (avoid silent failure / read-only fs error) ACONTEXT_DIR=/Users/aarontjomsland/dev/er-simulator-superrepo/acontext if [ ! -d "$ACONTEXT_DIR" ]; then echo "[$(date)] acontext dir missing ($ACONTEXT_DIR); job is dormant, no compose available" exit 64 # EX_USAGE — observable, non-zero, lets launchd record it without restart loop fi # Wait for Docker to be ready (up to 120 seconds) for i in {1..24}; do if docker info &>/dev/null; then cd "$ACONTEXT_DIR" /Users/aarontjomsland/.acontext/bin/acontext docker up -d exit 0 fi sleep 5 done echo "[$(date)] Docker not ready after 120s, skipping Acontext autostart" exit 75 # EX_TEMPFAIL
